steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states a general claim: Singletary "often collaborates with other artists." The blank begins the next sentence, which names one specific collaborator (Jody Naranjo). The transition must signal that the Naranjo sentence is a concrete instance of the general claim.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• "In conclusion,": Signals a closing summary. Naming one collaborator does not conclude or wrap up the passage. ✗
  • "For example,": Signals a specific instance supporting a general claim — exactly what naming Naranjo as one of Singletary's collaborators does. ✓
  • "However,": Signals contrast or contradiction. Working with Naranjo confirms, rather than contradicts, the claim about collaboration. ✗
  • "In comparison,": Signals a comparison between two items. No comparison is being drawn; a single example is being given. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
